utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format. llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each item from the final package to the exact matching entry in the ground-truth ratings dataset. Destination 'Vienna, Austria' matches 'Vienna, Austria' in destinations. Transportation specifies 'Budget Airlines Economy Class', which maps to transportation > budget_airlines > Economy Class.
